diary_entries.entry: Population: 23. Communication window with Earth opens. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Selene.
The earth_contact changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
The earth_contact changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 39): 'Today I realized: the output of Year 39 is the input to Year 40. We are being data-sloshed.'
